opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a sharp, stabbing pain in the center of my chest that gets agonizing if I take a deep breath or try to lie down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sharp central chest pain for a day that is much worse lying flat and on deep breathing and eased by sitting forward, after a recent viral illness.

symptom_narrative.duration: a day of sharp retrosternal chest pain
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing, pleuritic central chest pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising on deep breathing or lying flat; can't sleep lying down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: centre of the chest, sometimes radiating to the ridges of the shoulders (trapezius)
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant background pain, sharply worse lying flat and on deep inspiration, eased sitting up and leaning forward
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up and leaning forward relieves it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and taking a deep breath
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: radiation to the shoulder ridges; a mild recent viral illness (sore throat, aches) about a week ago; denies crushing pain, denies severe breathlessness at rest, fainting, or leg swelling
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting rigidly upright; unable to sleep lying down

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mild viral illness (sore throat and body aches) about a week ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; sleeping in a recliner chair because of the pain when lying flat

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in significant pain and worried it could be his heart
